---
title: "Versions"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

## Version Pages

::: {.version-grid}
::: {.version-card}
### v4 overview
First CNO-conditioned residual Flow Matching family.

[Open](v4.qmd)
:::

::: {.version-card}
### v4_s1_logit_t
Best early U-Net FM baseline with logit-normal time sampling.

[Open](v4_s1_logit_t.qmd)
:::

::: {.version-card}
### v4_s2_independent
Independent coupling ablation.

[Open](v4_s2_independent.qmd)
:::

::: {.version-card}
### v4_s3_no_attn
Attention ablation.

[Open](v4_s3_no_attn.qmd)
:::

::: {.version-card}
### v4_s4_grad_mu
Gradient conditioning ablation.

[Open](v4_s4_grad_mu.qmd)
:::

::: {.version-card}
### v4_s1_recoarsen_ft
Fine-tuning with LR/HR consistency through re-coarsening.

[Open](v4_s1_recoarsen_ft.qmd)
:::

::: {.version-card}
### v4_s1_cfg_ft
Fine-tuning with condition dropout for CFG.

[Open](v4_s1_cfg_ft.qmd)
:::

::: {.version-card}
### v4_s1_regional_ft
Fine-tuning with weighted sampling for Mediterranean, Black Sea and polar regions.

[Open](v4_s1_regional_ft.qmd)
:::

::: {.version-card}
### v6_full_geo_phys
Geography/physics-augmented variant.

[Open](v6_full_geo_phys.qmd)
:::

::: {.version-card}
### v7a_swin
Swin/window-attention experiment.

[Open](v7a_swin.qmd)
:::

::: {.version-card}
### v8a_dit_pixel
Pixel-space DiT experiment.

[Open](v8a_dit_pixel.qmd)
:::

::: {.version-card}
### v9a_songunet_edm
NCSN++/SongUNet with EDM denoising.

[Open](v9a_songunet_edm.qmd)
:::

::: {.version-card}
### v9b_songunet_bridge
Diffusion bridge from noisy CNO to HR.

[Open](v9b_songunet_bridge.qmd)
:::

::: {.version-card}
### v9c_dit_cfg_recoarsen
DiT with CFG training and re-coarsening.

[Open](v9c_dit_cfg_recoarsen.qmd)
:::
:::
